data.body: Config-map evidence: rising novelty floor (t_novel=0.7, floor=0.4) is SHIPPED for both plan-review (recall+floor, remediation_mode) and code-review (region-gated) but INERT — novelty_drop_active + remediation_mode default False, rebar.toml sets neither; every re-review is full+un-floored. Plan-review: 11 blocking criteria @0.60-0.75, 25 advisory @0.95; 3 post-cal FP fixes (grounding 3p symbols, G1G2 carve-out, snapshot read) mean pre-07-09 corpus overstates E4/G1G2 FPs. Code-review: only 2 DET security criteria block; LLM criteria advisory-locked by ADR 0036 pending A/B gate on code-v2 cohort. Completion verifier: binary, prompt-level knobs only. No .rebar overlay; changes go to packaged registries + pinning tests. Awaiting Gerrit agent.
